QCL_MVP_Dynastyontop_s1.blurb: Dynastyontop owned the league for Lost Generation. His MVP season featured nearly a triple-double on insane 78.1% FG and 55.9% from deep.

QCL_OPOY_Iboola_s1.blurb: Iboola redefined offensive dominance for Team Obsidian. Averaging 33.7 PPG on an absurd 71.7% from deep while dropping 8.2 threes a game, he's your undeniable OPOY.
